heading: Long-term lease authority for lighthouse property
label: 908 Long-term lease authority for lighthouse property

children.label: a
children.text: The Commandant may lease to non-Federal entities, including private individuals, lighthouse property under the administrative control of the Coast Guard for terms not to exceed 30 years. Consideration for the use and occupancy of lighthouse property leased under this section, and for the value of any utilities and services furnished to a lessee of such property by the Commandant, may consist, in whole or in part, of non-pecuniary remuneration including the improvement, alteration, restoration, rehabilitation, repair, and maintenance of the leased premises by the lessee. shall not apply to leases issued by the Commandant under this section.Section 1302 of title 40

children.label: b
children.text: Amounts received from leases made under this section, less expenses incurred, shall be deposited in the fund established under section 2946.
